text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text:
Happy birthday!
Nature, have a happy birthday!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Uh, that was so out of sync... Though I did get the
gist of what you were trying to say.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Okay, forget that—we also thought of a little
message we wanted to tell you.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
You'll be moved to tears! Ready, Machitan? Here
we go...

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for always looking out for us!
You have Turbo's eternal gratitude!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Okay, this time I didn't catch any of it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But, it's the thought that counts, so... Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Okay, now that we got that out of the way...

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text:
Let's go eat some birthday cake!
Let's go eat some birthday cake!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, so now you guys are in—you know what? I'll just let it slide...
